diagrams.title: File Locking State Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the transitions between unlocked, shared-locked, and exclusive-locked states for a file
diagrams.purpose: Understanding file locking mechanics and state transitions

diagrams.title: Deadlock Scenario in File Sharing
diagrams.description: Two processes holding locks on different files while waiting for each other's locks
elements: Process P1 holds Lock A, waiting for Lock B
Process P2 holds Lock B, waiting for Lock A
Resource allocation graph showing the cycle
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how deadlock occurs in file sharing situations

diagrams.title: Readers-Writers Problem Model
diagrams.description: Shows how readers and writers access a shared file with proper synchronization
diagrams.purpose: Understanding concurrent access control for files with multiple readers/writers
